title: Roblox copy wand (worldedit)
description: Changes the wooden axe into a texture inspired by the roblox copy wand meant for use with worldedit.
body:
Replaces the wooden axe with a texture inspired by the roblox copy wand intended for use with worldedit.

This amazing very magical wand will be sure to **BLOW** your family and friends away at how amazing and cool it is :).
